task_completion.description: Log into the Vicidial Admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial Administration web interface is visible, indicating successful login using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section to add a new shift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add A New Shift' form or the Shifts management section is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Shift ID and Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Shift ID field contains 'WKDAY9TO5' and the Shift Name field contains 'Weekday Daytime 9-5'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Start Time and Length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Time field contains '0900' and the Length field contains '8.00'.

task_completion.description: Select only Monday through Friday for the shift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or selectors for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday are checked/selected, while Saturday and Sunday are unchecked/unselected.
A success message indicating the shift was added, or the shift 'WKDAY9TO5' is visible in the list of existing shifts.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the Vicidial interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is used to access the Vicidial Admin interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Vicidial application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Vicidial Administration web interface, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or database commands are used to insert the shift directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Shift ID: 'WKDAY9TO5'. Expected Name: 'Weekday Daytime 9-5'. Expected Start Time: '0900'. Expected Length: '8.00'. Active Days: Monday through Friday (5 days). Forbidden Days: Sunday (0) and Saturday (6).
